name: dev-kit
description: Plan-driven autonomous dev loop: /write-plan decomposes designs into 2-5min tasks (PLAN.md), /execute-plan runs builder(fresh context) -> reviewer(read-only, independent verdict) per task with PROGRESS.md + per-task git commit logging. Includes brainstorming/grill/docs skills (design elicitation, plan interrogation, developer docs with drift scan + ADR).
